title: Snowman House
description: Adds small Snowman Houses that generate in snowy biomes such as Snowy Plains, Snowy Taiga, and Ice Spikes
body:
**Snowman House**

This simple mod adds a cozy Snowman House structure to snowy biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a67d755ea9bc0f6c45206f6f8002c0fcf2e161d.jpeg)

The house is decorated and ready to live in, featuring biome fitting decorations, cozy details, and some loot to discover.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b22d777f2dbffa6d082bb58f6e9149bbaf485dd8.jpeg)

You can find the Snowman House exclusively in Snowy Plains, Snowy Taiga, and Ice Spikes biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
